sentence: 这张图片的像素太低了，看不清楚。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng túpiàn de xiàngsù tài dī le, kàn bù qīngchǔ.
english: This image has too low a pixel count to see clearly.

sentence: 科学家已经找到了这次疫情的病原。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā yǐjīng zhǎodào le zhè cì yìqíng de bìngyuán.
english: Scientists have already identified the pathogen behind this outbreak.

meaning: 1. to turn over (when lying); 2. (fig.) to free oneself; 3. to emancip
sentence: 宝宝学会翻身了，妈妈很开心。
pinyin: Bǎobao xuéhuì fānshēn le, māma hěn kāixīn.
english: The baby learned to roll over, and Mom was thrilled.

sentence: 她从小就对自然科学很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù duì zìrán kēxué hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: She has been interested in natural sciences since childhood.

sentence: 打印机里的纸张用完了。
pinyin: Dǎyìnjī lǐ de zhǐzhāng yòng wán le.
english: The paper in the printer has run out.
